toc_notes: TOC spans two pages (images 4 and 5 = printed folios ii–iii; image 6 = printed folio iv). Folios ii, iii, and iv are roman-numeral front matter. First Arabic-numeral page (1) appears on image 8 (Royal Victoria Marathon ad); page 2 appears on image 9 (PowerLung ad). Departments page lists: Editorial p.5, On the Road with Scott Douglas p.8, My Most Unforgettable Ultramarathon/Hardrock 1999 p.83, Quad Cities Marathon p.118, Letters p.132, On the Mark p.135, About the Authors p.137. Features page lists: The Man of Steele Defies Science p.14, Marathon Training: More From Less p.27, The Day of the Amby p.43, Blow Up, Break Down p.51, Track Time p.66, A Run Between Two Oceans p.72. Special Book Bonus: Wobble to Death (Peter Lovesey) p.98.
